info.title: Error: Exception has been thrown by the target of an invocation.
info.description:
Neighter Distributed nor Standalone was requested.
MASES.KNetConnect -[d|s] [-k] connect-standalone.properties [-KafkaLocation kafkaFolder] <JCOBridgeArguments> <ClassArguments>
LogClassPath                  : Add on command-line to show ClassPath resoluti-
on and report all Jars found. The argument is -
optional. Default: False.
WriteEventOrExceptionOnCmdLine: Add on command-line to show on console the eve-
nts and exceptions from the underlying JCOBrid-
ge engine. The argument is optional. Default: -
False.
ScalaVersion                  : The version of scala to be used. The argument -
is optional. Default: 2.13.6.
KafkaLocation                 : The folder where Kafka package are stored. Def-
ault consider the application use the Jars in -
the package. The argument is optional. Default-
: C:\Users\runneradmin\AppData\Local\Temp\insp-
ectra-help-mases.knetconnect-3.2.2-ee6426fb46a-
84aae822f3366f92dfe89\tool\.store\mases.knetco-
nnect\3.2.2\mases.knetconnect\3.2.2\tools\net8-
.0\any\jars\.
Log4JConfiguration            : The file containing the configuration of log4j-
. The argument is optional. Default: C:\Users\-
runneradmin\AppData\Local\Temp\inspectra-help--
mases.knetconnect-3.2.2-ee6426fb46a84aae822f33-
66f92dfe89\tool\.store\mases.knetconnect\3.2.2-
\mases.knetconnect\3.2.2\tools\net8.0\any\conf-
ig\tools-log4j2.yaml.
LogPath                       : The path where log will be stored. The argumen-
t is optional. Default: C:\Users\runneradmin\A-
ppData\Local\Temp\inspectra-help-mases.knetcon-
nect-3.2.2-ee6426fb46a84aae822f3366f92dfe89\to-
ol\.store\mases.knetconnect\3.2.2\mases.knetco-
nnect\3.2.2\tools\net8.0\any\logs\.
DisableJMX                    : Disable JMX. Default is JMX enabled without se-
curity. The argument is optional.
KNetVersion (K)               : Connect will run using KNet version of Standal-
one or Distributed. The argument is optional.
Distributed (D)               : Connect will run in distributed mode. The argu-
ment is optional.
Standalone (S)                : Connect will run in standalone mode. The argum-
ent is optional.
s: start Connect in standalone mode.
d: start Connect in distributed mode.
k: start Connect in distributed/standalone mode using KNet version.
KafkaLocation: The folder where Kafka package is available. Default consider this application uses the package jars folder.
ScalaVersion: the scala version to be used. The default version (2.13.6) is binded to the deafult Apache Kafka version available in the package.
Log4JConfiguration: the log4j configuration file; the default uses the file within the package.
JCOBridgeArguments: the arguments of JCOBridge (see online at https://www.jcobridge.com/net-examples/command-line-options/ for the possible values).
ClassArguments: the arguments of the class. Depends on the ClassToRun value, to obtain them runs the application or look at requested class documentation.
The Main classes can be invoked are: AclCommand, AdminClientConfig, BrokerApiVersionsCommand, ClientCompatibilityTest, ClientMetricsCommand, ClusterTool, ConfigCommand, ConnectDistributed, ConnectPluginPath, ConnectStandalone, ConsoleConsumer, ConsoleProducer, ConsoleShareConsumer, ConsumerConfig, ConsumerGroupCommand, ConsumerPerformance, DelegationTokenCommand, DeleteRecordsCommand, DumpLogSegments, EndToEndLatency, FeatureCommand, GetOffsetShell, GroupsCommand, JmxTool, KafkaStart, KNetConnectDistributed, KNetConnectStandalone, LeaderElectionCommand, LogCompactionTester, LogDirsCommand, MetadataQuorumCommand, MetadataShell, MirrorCheckpointConfig, MirrorCheckpointTaskConfig, MirrorConnectorConfig, MirrorHeartbeatConfig, MirrorMaker, MirrorMaker2, MirrorSourceConfig, MirrorSourceTaskConfig, OAuthCompatibilityTool, ProducerConfig, ProducerPerformance, ReassignPartitionsCommand, ReplicaVerificationTool, ShareConsumerPerformance, ShareGroupCommand, StorageTool, StreamsConfig, StreamsGroupCommand, StreamsResetter, TestRaftServer, TopicCommand, TransactionalMessageCopier, TransactionsCommand, VerifiableConsumer, VerifiableProducer, VerifiableShareConsumer, GenericCommand, JVMBridgeMainExtensible`1, ...
